TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Langas ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 136 buwan, 342 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 304 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 68%, Bunun 18%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Langas hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Langas hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Langas hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Langas hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Langas hya' ga Morocan. tay 'llaw na Langas hya' ga Olaw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Langas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Langas ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ laŋas~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun **%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa moroʦ~ʨan. taj ʔllaw na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa olaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ laŋas~ɕ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ laŋas~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Langas ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 136 buwan, 342 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 304 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 38 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 68%, Bunun 18%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Langas hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Langas hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Langas hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Langas hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Langas hya' ga Morocan. tay 'llaw na Langas hya' ga Olaw. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Langas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Langas ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ laŋas~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun **%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa moroʦ~ʨan. taj ʔllaw na laŋas~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa olaw. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ laŋas~ɕ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ laŋas~ɕ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
